Class Invoice

java.lang.Object
com.runticket.model.Invoice
public class Invoice extends Object
The Invoice class represents an invoice for a ticket purchase by a Customer for a specific event. It calculates the total amount including tax and member discounts, and provides methods to print the invoice details.
Author:
Francisco Garcia, Henry Ng, Adrian Sifuentes

    Returns the amount to be deducted from the event due to refunds

    Returns the profit made by the event from the ticket sale, not including fees or tax

    Returns the full refund amount including all fees (used for event cancellation)

  • Constructor Details

    • Invoice

      public Invoice(Customer customer, Tickets ticket, Event event)
      Constructor for Invoice class with customer, ticket, and event parameters
      Parameters:
      customer - the customer making the purchase
      ticket - the tickets being purchased
      event - the event for which the tickets are being purchased

  • Method Details

    • getCustomer

      public Customer getCustomer()
      Returns:
      customer, the customer making the purchase

    • getTicket

      public Tickets getTicket()
      Returns:
      ticket, the tickets being purchased

    • getTax

      public double getTax()
      Returns:
      tax, the tax amount collected

    • getMemberDiscount

      public double getMemberDiscount()
      Returns:
      discountSavings, the discount amount for members

    • getEvent

      public Event getEvent()
      Gets the event associated with this invoice.
      Returns:
      the event for which the tickets were purchased

    • getTicketNum

      public int getTicketNum()
      Returns:
      the ticket amount, the number of tickets purchased

      public double returnTotal()
      Returns the total amount
      Returns:

      Returns the convenience fee

      Returns the ticket fee
      Returns:

      Returns the charity fee

    • getInvoiceID

      public String getInvoiceID()
      Returns the invoice ID
      Returns:

    • getEventRefund

      public double getEventRefund()
      Returns the amount to be deducted from the event due to refunds
      Returns:
      eventTicketProfit

    • getCustomerRefund

      public double getCustomerRefund()
      Returns the amount to be refunded to the customer, not including fees
      Returns:
      customerRefund

    • getFullRefund

      public double getFullRefund()
      Returns the full refund amount including all fees (used for event cancellation)
      Returns:
      fullRefund the total amount including fees

    • getEventTicketProfit

      public double getEventTicketProfit()
      Returns the profit made by the event from the ticket sale, not including fees or tax
      Returns:
      eventTicketProfit

    • calculateTotalAmount

      public double calculateTotalAmount()
      Calculates the total amount for the invoice including tax, member discounts, and fees
      Returns:
      total, the total amount

    • printInvoice

      public void printInvoice()
      Prints the invoice details including customer information, event details, ticket information, and total amount
